nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 法屬圭亞那

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: griseifrons is found in Brazil south of the Amazon between the Madeira and Tapajós rivers and south to Mato Grosso and southern Goiás and into extreme northeastern Bolivia. The species inhabits humid terra firme and várzea forest where it frequents the mid-story to canopy. In Brazil it ranges in elevation from sea level to . It reaches in Venezuela
